code_interface: def setTargetPose(x, y, z, roll, pitch, yaw)
description: Set target pose for robot movement

code_interface: def setPose0(x, y, z, roll, pitch, yaw)
description: Set first pose for pick and place operation

code_interface: def setPose1(x, y, z, roll, pitch, yaw)
description: Set second pose for pick and place operation
Execute movement to the set target pose
Pick object with specified force and approach axis (0=x, 1=y, 2=z)
Place object with specified approach axis (0=x, 1=y, 2=z)
Push object along specified axis for given distance
Pull object along specified axis for given distance
Perform sweeping motion along specified axis
Control gripper with specified width and force
Combined pick and place operation using pose0 and pose1
Get current robot pose in Euler angles
Get current pose with adjusted orientation
